customer_name: Christine's House of Pets T/A Precious Pets III
site_name: Christine's House OF Pets T/A Precious Pets III

citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:15 pm - 2:15 pm
on April 24, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by phone call and email. Failure to provide access to
the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide
access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:15 pm - 2:15 pm 
on April 24, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by phone call and email. Failure to provide access to 
the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide 
access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
